# TransactionModal Shadow Spec

> TransactionModal - Redesigned transaction entry bottom sheet aligned with the design system, replacing the current Material3 TabRow/OutlinedTextField layout with design-token-native components

**Status:** Planned
**Generated by:** spec-lead + @pseudo-worker

---

## Context Imports

```sudolang
import("specs/ARCHITECTURE.md")
import("specs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md")
import("specs/FEATURES.md")
import("specs/DEPENDENCIES.md")
```

---

## Architecture

```sudolang
// Presentation-layer-only change — no domain or data layer modifications
//
// Files modified:
//   features/transactions/presentation/components/TransactionFormSheet.kt
//
// New design system components (added to core/designsystem/component/form/):
//   BcInputGroup.kt       — labeled text input (node c9XFF)
//   BcCheckboxRow.kt      — checkbox + label row (node 4SRSD)
//   LargeAmountInput.kt   — hero amount display input (node L2zpZ)
//
// All new components live in commonMain — no platform-specific code
```

---

## Data Model

```sudolang
// No new domain models. The modal reads/writes the existing:
interface CreateTransactionRequest {
  accountId: Long;
  amount: Long;              // cents
  date: Long;                // Unix ms UTC
  type: TransactionType;     // INCOME | EXPENSE
  status: TransactionStatus; // PENDING | CONFIRMED (driven by STATUS checkboxes)
  category: String?;         // mapped from the "Name" field
  description: String?;      // not shown in modal — always null from this form
  destinationAccountId: Long?; // not used — TRANSFER removed from modal
}

// Modal local UI state (ephemeral, not persisted)
interface TransactionModalLocalState {
  amountInput: String;           // raw decimal string, e.g. "12.50"
  selectedDateMillis: Long;      // UTC start-of-day
  selectedAccountId: Long?;
  categoryInput: String;         // maps to CreateTransactionRequest.category
  statusInput: TransactionStatus; // PENDING | CONFIRMED
  showDatePicker: Boolean;
  accountMenuExpanded: Boolean;
}
```

---

## Constraints

```sudolang
Constraint: Type selector shows only INCOME and EXPENSE — TRANSFER is excluded from this modal
Constraint: "Name" field maps to category in CreateTransactionRequest — not a separate field
Constraint: Status checkboxes are mutually exclusive (radio-like): selecting one deselects the other
Constraint: Scheduled (Future) → TransactionStatus.PENDING; Paid / Cleared → TransactionStatus.CONFIRMED
Constraint: Amount field must use LargeAmountInput (node L2zpZ) — not OutlinedTextField
Constraint: Name / Date / Account fields must use BcInputGroup (node c9XFF)
Constraint: Status options must use BcCheckboxRow (node 4SRSD)
Constraint: CTA is a single full-width BcButton(variant = Primary) — no separate Cancel button
Constraint: X close button in header replaces Cancel — calls onCancel callback
Constraint: Date and Account fields render side-by-side in a Row with Modifier.weight(1f) each
Constraint: Description field is not shown — always passed as null to CreateTransactionRequest
Constraint: Modal opens fully expanded to full screen height — skipPartiallyExpanded = true on SheetState; no partial/half-expanded state
Constraint: Drag handle is hidden — dragHandle = {} on ModalBottomSheet
Constraint: CTA button is sticky at the bottom — lives outside the scrollable Column; only the form fields scroll
Constraint: All color, spacing, radius, and typography values use BcColors / BcSpacing / BcRadius / BcTypography tokens — no raw values
Constraint: Validation logic is unchanged: amount > 0, accountId required, category required
Constraint: Insufficient funds warning is preserved for EXPENSE type when amount > account balance
```

---

## Data Flow

```sudolang
// Open Modal Flow
User taps + (FAB) |> TransactionFormSheet(isVisible = true)
  |> LaunchedEffect sets selectedType to EXPENSE (default)
  |> LaunchedEffect auto-selects first account if none selected
  |> Render header (title + X), BcSegmentedControl, LargeAmountInput,
     BcInputGroup (Name), Row(BcInputGroup Date, BcInputGroup Account),
     STATUS section (2x BcCheckboxRow), BcButton CTA

// User changes type
User taps segment |> onSetType(TransactionType.INCOME | EXPENSE)
  |> uiState.selectedType updates
  |> BcSegmentedControl re-renders active segment
  |> CTA label updates: "Add Income" | "Add Expense"

// User selects status
User taps checkbox row |> statusInput = PENDING | CONFIRMED
  |> Both BcCheckboxRow instances re-render (one checked, one unchecked)

// Save flow
User taps CTA |> validate(amountInput, selectedAccountId, categoryInput)
  |> If errors: populate localErrors, return early
  |> onSave(CreateTransactionRequest(
       accountId, amount, date, type = selectedType,
       status = statusInput, category = categoryInput, description = null))

// Close flow
User taps X |> onCancel()
  |> ModalBottomSheet dismissed
```

---

## Function Signatures

```sudolang
// New design system components

fn LargeAmountInput(
  label: String,                   // "AMOUNT" — uppercase, caption style, 2sp letterSpacing
  amount: String,                  // raw decimal input string
  onAmountChange: (String) -> Unit,
  modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
)
// Renders: Column { caption label; BasicTextField(displayLarge typography, ₱0.00 placeholder) }

fn BcInputGroup(
  label: String,
  value: String,
  onValueChange: (String) -> Unit,
  placeholder: String,
  modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
  readOnly: Boolean = false,
  trailingContent: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null,
  isError: Boolean = false,
  errorText: String? = null,
  keyboardOptions: KeyboardOptions = KeyboardOptions.Default,
)
// Renders: Column { caption label; Box with 1.5dp borderStrong border, radius lg (12dp), BasicTextField }

fn BcCheckboxRow(
  label: String,
  checked: Boolean,
  onCheckedChange: (Boolean) -> Unit,
  modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
)
// Renders: Row(gap 12dp) { 24x24dp checkbox box (radius md/8dp, bgDark fill when checked); Text(bodyMedium) }

// Updated composable
fn TransactionFormSheet(
  isVisible: Boolean,
  uiState: TransactionFormUiState,
  initialDateMillis: Long,
  initialData: Transaction? = null,
  onSetType: (TransactionType) -> Unit,
  onSave: (CreateTransactionRequest) -> Unit,
  onCancel: () -> Unit,
  onDelete: ((Transaction) -> Unit)? = null,
)
```

---

## UI Components

```sudolang
// Components used in TransactionFormSheet (all from specs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.pen):
// L2zpZ (Form / Large Amount Input) → LargeAmountInput       — amount entry
// c9XFF (Input Group)               → BcInputGroup            — Name, Date, Account fields
// 4SRSD (Checkbox Row)              → BcCheckboxRow           — STATUS section
// mTtvR (Segmented Control)         → BcSegmentedControl      — Expense / Income toggle
// mbxe4 (Button / Primary)          → BcButton(Primary)       — "Add Expense" / "Add Income" CTA

// Layout structure:
// ModalBottomSheet(sheetState = skipPartiallyExpanded, dragHandle = {})
//   └── Column(fillMaxHeight)                          ← outer: fills full screen
//       ├── Column(weight(1f), verticalScroll, padding 24dp, gap 24dp)  ← scrollable content
//       │   ├── Row(spaceBetween)                      ← header
//       │   │   ├── Text("New Transaction", section style)
//       │   │   └── IconButton(Icons.Outlined.Close)
//       │   ├── BcSegmentedControl(["Expense", "Income"])
//       │   ├── LargeAmountInput("AMOUNT", amountInput)
//       │   ├── BcInputGroup("Name", categoryInput, placeholder = "e.g. Groceries")
//       │   ├── Row(gap 16dp)                          ← date + account side by side
//       │   │   ├── BcInputGroup("Date", readOnly, weight(1f))
//       │   │   └── BcInputGroup("Account", readOnly, weight(1f))
//       │   ├── Column(gap 16dp)                       ← STATUS section
//       │   │   ├── Text("STATUS", caption, letterSpacing 1sp)
//       │   │   ├── BcCheckboxRow("Scheduled (Future)", statusInput == PENDING)
//       │   │   └── BcCheckboxRow("Paid / Cleared", statusInput == CONFIRMED)
//       │   └── [InlineError / insufficient funds warning if present]
//       └── Column(padding horizontal 24dp, vertical 16dp, gap 8dp)  ← sticky bottom
//           ├── BcButton(Primary, fillMaxWidth, "Add Expense" | "Add Income" | "Save")
//           └── [TextButton("Delete") for edit mode only]
```

---

## Edge Cases

| Case | Condition | Handling |
|------|-----------|----------|
| Empty amount | `amountInput` blank or zero | Show inline error "Enter a valid amount"; block save |
| No account | `selectedAccountId` is null | Show inline error "Account is required"; block save |
| Empty name | `categoryInput` is blank | Show inline error "Category is required"; block save |
| Insufficient funds | EXPENSE amount > selected account balance | Show warning banner; allow save (warning only) |
| Edit mode | `initialData != null` | Title becomes "Edit Transaction"; CTA label is "Save"; Delete button appears below CTA |
| Single account | Only one account in `uiState.availableAccounts` | Auto-select; account field is read-only with that account's name |
| No accounts | `uiState.availableAccounts` is empty | Account field shows "No accounts" placeholder; save blocked |
| Submitting | `uiState.isSubmitting == true` | CTA shows "Saving…", disabled; X close button disabled |
| Amount placeholder | `amountInput` is empty | Display "₱0.00" in `textTertiary` color via BasicTextField decoration |
